person.name: Renaud IV de BAUGE
person.alternateName: Reinald IV Bauge en Bresse Seigneur
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoirie de Bâgé famille :
D’azur au lion d’hermine 
Sceau : Équestre à droite ; heaume cylindrique à timbre plat ; écu de profil, fruste.
Utilisé en 1250 Codicille ajouté à son testament.

RENAUD [IV] de Bâgé , fils d'ULRIC [V] Seigneur de Bâgé et de Bresse et sa seconde épouse Alexandrine de Vienne [Bourgogne-Comté] (-avant mars 1250). La source principale qui confirme sa filiation n'a pas été identifiée.  Seigneur de Bâgé et de Bresse. Testaments datés du 18 août 1249 et (en Égypte) du 29 mars 1250 [1] . 

m (1er janvier 1229) comme son premier mari, SIBYLLE de Beaujeu 

Sources : 
- COULON A., Inventaire des sceaux de la Bourgogne, Paris, 1912 ,  n° 186 ; 
- [1] ES XV 52. 
relevé  JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud IV de BAUGE於1185年12月9日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾時，他的父親Ulrich II de BAUGE36歲，母親Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE16歲。他於1229年1月1日與Sibylle de Beaujeu結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年4月12日在阿爾及利亞برج بوعريريجمنصورة享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud IV de BAUGE于1185年12月9日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾巴勒勒-a特爾时，他的父亲Ulrich II de BAUGE36岁，母亲Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE16岁。他于1229年1月1日与Sibylle de Beaujeu结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年4月12日在阿尔及利亚برج بوعريريجمنصورة享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BAUGE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so named.
Dutch: topographic name denoting an inhabitant of a farm or settlement on a hill. Compare   Ten Barge  .
English and French: metonymic occupational name for a boatman, bargeman, or seaman, from Middle English, Old French barge ‘boat, barge’. Compare French Labarge .

variants.name: Ten Barge
meanings: Dutch: variant of the topographic name Ten Berge ‘at the hill’ (see Berg ).

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud IV de BAUGE was born on 9 December 1185, in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Ulrich II de BAUGE, was 36 and his mother, Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE, was 16. He married Sibylle de Beaujeu on 1 January 1229. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 April 1250, in Mansourah, Bordj Bou Arréridj, Algeria, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud IV de BAUGE est né le 9 décembre 1185, à Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Ulrich II de BAUGE, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Sibylle de Beaujeu le 1 janvier 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1250, à Mansourah, Bordj Bou Arréridj, Algérie, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud IV de BAUGE am 9. Dezember 1185 in Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulrich II de BAUGE 36 und seine Mutter Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE 16. Er hat am 1. Januar 1229 Sibylle de Beaujeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1250 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Mansourah, Bordj Bou Arréridj, Algerien.

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud IV de BAUGE(이)가 1185년 12월 9일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 브a그e-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulrich II de BAUGE(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1229년 1월 1일 Sibylle de Beaujeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 4월 12일 알제리 برج بوعريريج منصورة에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud IV de BAUGE nasceu em 9 de dezembro de 1185, em Bâgé-le-Châtel, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Ulrich II de BAUGE, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibylle de Beaujeu em 1 de janeiro de 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1250, em Mansourah, Bordj Bou Arréridj, Algéria, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud IV de BAUGE родился 9 декабря 1185 г. в местности бaгe-ле-чaтел, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Ulrich II de BAUGE было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alexandrine de BOURGOGNE-COMTE, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylle de Beaujeu 1 января 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1250 г. в местности منصورة, برج بوعريريج, Алжир в возрасте 64 лет.
